positive: A stylized, vibrant illustration featuring a group of interconnected abstract flora and fauna elements forming a symmetrical mandalic pattern. Include motifs like iridescent hummingbirds, crystalline butterflies, bioluminescent lilies, and delicate vines that twist and interweave. The style should be a harmonious blend of Art Nouveau elegance and modern geometric tessellation, utilizing a limited but rich palette of deep teal, sapphire blue, gold, and emerald green. The composition must be centered, suitable for repeating textile print, providing strong visual contrast and a clear, clean silhouette against a creamy white background. Studio lighting, high detail, ultra-sharp focus, vector quality, isolated on white.
negative: blurry, low detail, noise, text, watermark, logos, grunge, realistic photo, signature, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, muted colors
